metadata.author: Generated for C# logging program
metadata.notes: Each contest lists its exchange fields split into individual components. 'sent' = what YOU transmit, 'received' = what you LOG from the other station. asymmetric=true means sent and received differ.

field_definitions.NAME: Operator first name
field_definitions.DXCC: DXCC entity / country name or abbreviation
field_definitions.STATE_PROVINCE: US State or Canadian Province abbreviation
field_definitions.HOLYLAND_AREA: Holyland area code: grid square + region (e.g. F15TA)
field_definitions.CHECK: ARRL Sweepstakes check: last 2 digits of year first licensed
field_definitions.AGE_GROUP: Age/gender group category (e.g. OM, YL, Youth)

contests.name: CQ Worldwide DX Contest, SSB
contests.qso_points: 1pt same country, 2pt same continent, 3pt diff continent

contests.name: CQ Worldwide DX Contest, CW
contests.qso_points: 1pt same country, 2pt same continent, 3pt diff continent

contests.name: CQ Worldwide DX Contest, RTTY
contests.qso_points: 1pt same country, 2pt same continent, 3pt diff continent

contests.name: CQ WW WPX Contest, SSB
contests.qso_points: 1-6 pts depending on continent and band

contests.name: CQ WW WPX Contest, CW
contests.qso_points: 1-6 pts depending on continent and band

contests.name: CQ WW RTTY WPX Contest
contests.qso_points: 1-6 pts depending on continent and band

contests.name: ARRL International DX Contest, SSB
contests.notes: W/VE stations send State/Province; DX stations send power in watts
contests.multipliers: W/VE: DXCC entities per band; DX: US States + DC + VE provinces per band

contests.name: ARRL International DX Contest, CW
contests.notes: W/VE stations send State/Province; DX stations send power in watts
contests.multipliers: W/VE: DXCC entities per band; DX: US States + DC + VE provinces per band

contests.name: ARRL November Sweepstakes, SSB
contests.notes: Longest exchange in contesting. PRECEDENCE: A=assisted, B=unassisted, M=multi, Q=QRP, S=school, U=unlimited. CHECK=last 2 digits of year first licensed.

contests.name: ARRL November Sweepstakes, CW
contests.notes: PRECEDENCE: A=assisted, B=unassisted, M=multi, Q=QRP, S=school, U=unlimited. CHECK=last 2 digits of year first licensed.

contests.name: ARRL Field Day
contests.notes: Class example: 2A = 2 transmitters, Class A. Section = ARRL/RAC section. DX stations send 'DX' as section.

contests.name: ARRL RTTY Roundup
contests.notes: W/VE send State or Province; DX stations send serial number
multipliers: US states + DC + VE provinces + DXCC per band

contests.name: ARRL 10-Meter Contest
contests.notes: W/VE send State; DX sends serial number

contests.name: ARRL June VHF Contest
contests.notes: 4-character Maidenhead grid square (e.g. FN31)

contests.name: IARU HF World Championship
contests.notes: IARU HQ stations send their society abbreviation (e.g. W1AW sends ARRL); others send ITU zone
contests.qso_points: 1pt same zone, 3pt diff zone same continent, 5pt diff continent

contests.name: WAE DX Contest, SSB
contests.notes: Non-European stations can also send/receive QTCs (batches of 10 previous QSO data). QTCs are a unique WAE feature.

contests.name: WAE DX Contest, CW
contests.notes: Non-European stations can also send/receive QTCs (batches of 10 previous QSO data).

contests.name: WAE DX Contest, RTTY
contests.period: Last full weekend of November (Sat only)

contests.name: RSGB IOTA Contest
contests.notes: Island stations include their IOTA reference (e.g. EU-005). Non-island stations send serial only.

contests.name: World Wide Holyland DX Contest
contests.notes: HOLYLAND_AREA = 10x10km grid square + region abbreviation (e.g. F15TA). 23 regions in Israel. Israeli stations (4X/4Z prefix) send their area; DX stations send serial number.

contests.name: All Asian DX Contest, CW
contests.notes: Both sides send age in years. Use 00 if operator prefers not to disclose. Only QSOs with Asian stations count.

contests.name: All Asian DX Contest, Phone
contests.notes: Both sides send age. Use 00 if not disclosing. Only QSOs with Asian stations count.

contests.name: Oceania DX Contest, Phone
contests.period: First full weekend of October (Saturday SSB)

contests.name: Oceania DX Contest, CW
contests.period: First full weekend of October (Sunday CW)

contests.name: JIDX CW Contest
contests.notes: JA stations send their prefecture code (47 prefectures); non-JA stations send CQ zone
contests.multipliers: JA: CQ zones; non-JA: JA prefectures per band

contests.name: JIDX Phone Contest
contests.notes: JA stations send prefecture code; non-JA stations send CQ zone
contests.multipliers: JA: CQ zones; non-JA: JA prefectures per band

contests.name: Russian DX Contest
contests.notes: Russian stations send their oblast (district) code; non-Russian send serial number
multipliers: Russian oblasts per band per mode

contests.name: Ukrainian DX Contest
contests.notes: Ukrainian stations send their oblast code; non-Ukrainian send serial number

contests.name: Hungarian DX Contest
contests.notes: HA stations send 2-letter county code; others send serial number

contests.name: Helvetia Contest
contests.notes: Swiss (HB9) stations send their canton code; others send serial number
contests.qso_points: 1pt same country, 2pt same continent, 3pt different continent

contests.name: His Maj. King of Spain Contest, SSB
contests.notes: EA stations send their province code; non-EA send serial number

contests.name: His Maj. King of Spain Contest, CW
ARI International DX Contest
contests.notes: Italian stations send province abbreviation; others send serial number
multipliers: Italian provinces per band per mode

contests.name: SP DX Contest
contests.notes: Polish (SP) stations send their district (voivodeship) code; others send serial number

contests.name: North American QSO Party, SSB
contests.notes: No RST exchanged. NA stations send name + state/province. Non-NA stations send name only.

contests.name: North American QSO Party, CW
contests.notes: No RST. NA stations send name + state/province; non-NA send name only.

contests.name: North American Sprint, CW
contests.notes: After each QSO, the station that was called must QSY. No RST.

contests.name: North American SSB Sprint Contest
contests.notes: After each QSO the called station must QSY. No RST.

contests.name: BARTG HF RTTY Contest
contests.notes: Unique: exchange includes current UTC time (HHMM) of the QSO

contests.name: Worldwide Sideband Activity Contest
contests.notes: AGE_GROUP: OM (male >26), YL (female >26), Youth (<=26), Youth YL (female <=26). No serial number.

contests.name: SKCC Sprint
contests.notes: MEMBER_NR: SKCC membership number or 'NONE' for non-members

contests.name: CWops Test (CWT)
contests.notes: No RST. Members send name + membership number. Non-members send name + state/province/country.

contests.name: Parks on the Air (POTA)
contests.notes: Activator at a park sends their park reference (e.g. K-0001). Hunter just confirms RST. Not a traditional timed contest.
contests.dupe_rule: Once per band per mode per park

contests.name: Summits on the Air (SOTA)
contests.notes: Activator on a summit sends summit reference (e.g. VK2/HU-001). Not a traditional timed contest.
contests.dupe_rule: Once per band per mode per summit

contests.name: RAC Canada Day Contest
contests.notes: VE stations send province; non-VE send serial number

contests.name: LZ DX Contest
contests.notes: LZ stations send their district code; others send serial
multipliers: LZ districts per band per mode

contests.name: OK/OM DX Contest, CW
contests.notes: OK/OM stations send district code; others send serial number

contests.name: YO DX HF Contest
contests.notes: YO (Romanian) stations send their district code; others send serial
multipliers: YO districts per band per mode

contests.name: RSGB IOTA Contest
contests.notes: Island operators include IOTA reference (e.g. EU-005). Non-island stations send RST+serial only.

contests.name: Commonwealth (BERU) Contest
contests.notes: Commonwealth stations only — only QSOs between Commonwealth countries count

contests.name: Winter Field Day
contests.notes: Similar to ARRL Field Day. Class example: 1H = 1 transmitter, Home.
